vocab.example: I strictly allocate funds for footwear every quarter to ensure I don't overspend on impulsive fashion choices.
While some designer sneakers carry an exorbitant price tag, I find that mid-range brands often offer better durability.

vocab.meaning: chi phí trên mỗi lần mặc/sử dụng
vocab.example: I justify expensive leather boots by calculating the cost-per-wear, as they usually last me for several years.
Being a bit of a bargain hunter, I typically wait for end-of-season clearance sales to purchase high-end trainers.

vocab.meaning: thu nhập khả dụng (tiền dư sau khi trừ thuế và chi phí thiết yếu)
vocab.example: Only a small fraction of my disposable income goes toward shoes, as I prioritize savings and travel.

vocab.meaning: món đồ đáng để đầu tư (có giá trị sử dụng lâu dài hoặc tăng giá)
vocab.example: I view a solid pair of formal oxfords as an investment piece rather than just another fashion accessory.

vocab.meaning: một lần vung tay quá trán/chi tiêu xa xỉ
vocab.example: Buying these limited-edition basketball shoes was definitely a splurge, but they were too unique to pass up.

vocab.meaning: phù hợp với mục đích sử dụng
vocab.example: I only spend a substantial amount if the footwear is fit for purpose, especially when it comes to technical trekking boots.

vocab.meaning: các khoản chi tiêu bằng tiền mặt/tiền túi
vocab.example: Unexpected out-of-pocket expenses for shoe repairs can sometimes be higher than the cost of a new pair.
Maintaining a frugal mindset helps me resist the urge to buy every new collection that hits the shelves.
